Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to find a trace that model permits but violates domain

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Structure Receive Order Check Inventory xor node close order So after receiving order and checking inventory we go to xor node which has two branches

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Branch A successful subtree authorize payment package items ship order These are parallel In PM4Py parallel means activities can be executed in any order but they must all be present

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Branch B cancel subtree sequence cancel order close order

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Thus overall allowed traces are sequences where Receive Order occurs Check Inventory occurs Then either authorize payment package items ship order and then close order or cancel order then close order

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Potential problematic trace Receive Order Check Inventory Cancel Order Authorize Payment Package Items Ship Order Close Order

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Does the model allow Ca before Ap After C we go to xor node The model requires exactly one of the two branches to be executed

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Thus the more plausible invalid trace is the one where you do Authorize Payment then Cancel Order because you cannot cancel after payment

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets verify if the model permits Receive Order Check Inventory Authorize Payment Cancel Order Package Items Ship Order Close Order

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The model may allow extra activities after the XOR because there is no restriction that prevents doing Cancel Order after Authorize Payment Package Items Ship Order as long as Close Order also occurs

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - IND
Text: You cannot cancel an order after you have already authorized payment and shipped items

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In the Order to Cash process payment and shipping must happen only if the order is valid and inventory sufficient The correct flow is to cancel before any payment or shipping if inventory is insufficient

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The model allows this sequence because it only enforces a simple XOR between a successful path payment packaging shipping and a cancel path cancel then close It does not forbid mixing activities from both paths
